schema.description: The representation of a company's signatory
schema.title: Signatory

is_admin.description: Whether or not the signatory is also the payroll admin of the company.

has_ssn.description: Indicates whether the signatory has an SSN in Gusto.

version.description: The current version of the signatory. See the [versioning guide](https://docs.gusto.com/embedded-payroll/docs/idempotency) for information on how to use this field.

identity_verification_status.description:
|   |   |
|---|---|
|__Status__| __Description__ |
| Pass | Signatory can sign all forms |
| Fail | Signatory cannot sign forms |
| Skipped | Signatory cannot sign Form 8655 until the form is manually uploaded as wet-signed |
| null | Identity verification process has not been completed |
